---
title: "education_related_eda"
format: pdf
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(arrow)
library(ggthemes)

data <- read_parquet("../data/clean_data.parquet")
```

```{r}
glimpse(data[1:27])
```

```{r}
education_eda_30 <- data %>% 
  filter(age >= 30) %>% 
  select(age,
         race,
         gross_rent,
         income_personal,
         education,
         health_insurance,
         snap_benefits,
         puma)

glimpse(education_eda_30)
```

```{r}
education_eda_30 %>%
  filter(income_personal <= 500000) %>% 
  ggplot() +
    geom_boxplot(aes(x = income_personal / 1000,
                     y = reorder(education, income_personal)),
                 outlier.shape = NA) + 
  theme_few() +
  ylab("") +
  xlab("Income (thousands)") +
  labs(title = "Higher Education Level Is Associated with Higher Income",
       caption = "Source: ACS PUMS 2024 for LA County")
```
